message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Taskset Execution Sequence Diagram

' Define participants with appropriate stereotypes
participant "Client" as Client
rectangle "Master" {
    participant "Dispatcher" as Dispatcher
    database "Database" as Database
    participant "RSyncServer" as RSyncServer
    participant "Arbiter" as Arbiter
}
rectangle "Worker" {
    participant "Worker" as Worker
}

' Initial task creation and dispatching
Client -> Dispatcher: Create a taskset
activate Dispatcher
Dispatcher -> Database: Enqueue tasks
deactivate Dispatcher

Client -> Dispatcher: Taskset request
activate Dispatcher
Dispatcher -> Worker: Taskset dispatch
activate Worker
Worker -> Database: Log the worker participation
deactivate Worker

' Synchronization phase
note over RSyncServer, Worker: RSync
RSyncServer -> Worker: RSync
activate Worker
deactivate Worker

' Setup phase
note over RSyncServer, Worker: Setup
Worker -> Worker: Worker setup
activate Worker
Worker -> Database: Add a worker setup log
deactivate Worker

alt setup failed
    Worker -> Arbiter: Fail request
    activate Arbiter
    Arbiter -> Database: Mark the taskset as failed
    Arbiter -> Worker: Notify the taskset is marked as failed
    deactivate Arbiter
end

' Testing phase
note over Arbiter, Worker: Testing
Worker -> Slave: Spawn slaves
activate Slave
Slave -> Slave: Slave setup
deactivate Slave

loop while tasks exist
    Slave -> Database: Dequeue a task
    Database --> Slave: Return a task
    Slave -> Database: Add a trial
    Slave -> Slave: Execute a task
    activate Slave
    deactive Slave
    Slave -> Database: Add a trial result
    Slave -> Arbiter: Notify the trial result
    activate Arbiter
    
    Arbiter -> Database: Query the trial result
    Database --> Arbiter: Respond to the query
    
    alt passed or pending
        Arbiter -> Database: Mark the task as finished
    else retry needed
        Arbiter -> Database: Enqueue the task
    else no more retries
        Arbiter -> Database: Mark the task as failed
    end
    deactivate Arbiter
end

Slave -> Database: Dequeue a task
Database --> Slave: No tasks left
deactivate Slave

Arbiter -> Database: Check request
activate Arbiter
Arbiter -> Database: Check whether all tasks are finished

alt some tasks are left
    Arbiter -> Database: Enqueue the tasks
else
    Arbiter -> Database: Mark the taskset as finished
    Arbiter -> Worker: Notify the taskset is marked as finished
    Worker -> Slave: Kill slaves
    deactivate Slave
    deactivate Worker
    Slave -> Database: Add slave logs
end
deactivate Arbiter

' Final status query
Client -> Database: Query the status of the taskset
Database --> Client: Respond to the query

@enduml
```
